headline: Halliburton, Valero and 3 More Stocks Set Up for a Fragile Hormuz Truce
summary: Brent crude has crashed over 20% as Hormuz reopens. Here are 5 oil and gas stocks positioned to gain from a fragile, still-unfolding peace.

headline: Halliburton's Q2 2026 Earnings: What to Expect
summary: Halliburton will release its second-quarter earnings next month, and analysts anticipate a low single-digit profit dip.
